articles.title: Bid to clean up a rotten trail in Hyderabad’s thriving food scene
articles.description: Beneath Hyderabad’s booming food economy lies a dark web of adulteration, mislabelling and unsafe practices. Of late, an unprecedented police-led crackdown is pulling back the curtain on a sprawling food fraud network that thrives on gaps in regulation and consumer trust. But as enforcement tightens and complaints surge, the city finds itself trying not just to fix a broken food chain, but also to restore faith in what lands on every plate, write Serish Nanisetti and Lavpreet Kaur

dailyNews.description: Zohran Mamdani, a Democrat, has notched a few notable early wins, and has reached a detente - at least for now - with US President Donald Trump.

dailyNews.title: France to ditch Windows for Linux to reduce reliance on US tech
dailyNews.description: France's move to ditch Windows for Linux is its latest effort to reduce its reliance on American tech giants.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan sets modest goal for US-Iran summit: A deal to keep talks going
dailyNews.description: US-Iran talks open in Islamabad with mediators focused on keeping dialogue alive amid deep divisions.

dailyNews.title: Jeevan Reddy Meets KCR After Quitting Congress, Indicates He Will Join BRS
dailyNews.description: Reddy was with the Congress for over 40 years.

dailyNews.title: Was Trump ready to fire Tulsi Gabbard over Iran war testimony? Report claims Roger Stone intervened
dailyNews.description: Trump spoke with his cabinet members and asked he should replace Tulsi Gabbard. Trump was reportedly frustrated over Gabbard shielding one of her former employees who resigned over America's Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Vance expects ‘positive’ Iran talks as he heads to Islamabad
dailyNews.description: US VP JD Vance says Trump gave “clear guidelines” for Iran talks in Pakistan and expects “positive” negotiations.

dailyNews.title: Donald Trump Shares Cryptic 'Reset' Post Ahead Of Iran-US Peace Talks In Pakistan
dailyNews.description: The talks between Iran and the United States are set to begin Saturday morning local time in Islamabad, with the US delegation led by Vice President JD Vance, special envoy Steve Witkoff, and...

dailyNews.title: S&P 500, Nasdaq Edge Higher As US-Iran Peace Talks Keep Traders Optimistic
dailyNews.description: The S&P 500 rose 0.24% at open to trade at 6,841.10.

dailyNews.title: Go get ‘em: Mother of US soldier killed in Iran war told Trump to ‘finish it’
dailyNews.description: Cody Khork died as a captain in the Army Reserve and was posthumously promoted to major, the report added. “He was a hero. I’m so proud of him...,” his mother said in a interview.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump’s 'Dear G' email to Ghislaine Maxwell re-emerges after First Lady denies Epstein links
dailyNews.description: The mail was addressed to ‘Dear G’ and from ‘Love, Melania’. The contents of the letter showed the sender asking the recipient about their frequent travels and their time at Palm Beach, expressing eagerness to visit.

dailyNews.title: ‘For Trump, this is seen as an unmitigated failure, this war’
dailyNews.description: “For Trump, this is seen as an unmitigated failure, this war,” said Omar Rahman.

dailyNews.title: US consumer prices increased 3.3% in March amid high oil prices linked to Iran conflict
dailyNews.description: The Labor Department’s Bureau of Labor Statistics reported on Friday that the Consumer Price Index (CPI) climbed 0.9% last month, the biggest increase since June 2022, when prices surged in response to the Russia-Ukraine war.

dailyNews.title: 'They are not words I would use': UK PM Keir Starmer says Trump's Iran threats go against British values
dailyNews.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer remarked that President Trump's recent rhetoric regarding the destruction of Iran is inconsistent with ‘British values and principles’.

dailyNews.title: ‘Closer to a break than ever’: Can NATO survive if Trump pulls the US out?
dailyNews.description: The war in Iran has deepened a rift in the transatlantic alliance, raising questions about whether it can endure.

dailyNews.title: ‘Biggest infiltrator come from Gujarat’: Kanhaiya's veiled jibe at Amit Shah in Assam rally
dailyNews.description: In a veiled jibe at Union Minister Amit Shah, the Congress leader called on the voters to drive infiltrators from Gujarat out of the state.

dailyNews.title: Cuban president defiant despite Trump pressure to resign
dailyNews.description: Miguel Diaz-Canel vows to resist US pressure as Trump escalates threats, tightens oil blockade on the island.

dailyNews.title: Taiwan opposition leader meets Xi in Beijing as Taiwan defense fight intensifies
dailyNews.description: Xi Jinping met KMT leader Cheng Li-wun in Beijing as Taiwan's opposition blocks a $40 billion defense budget amid U.S. pressure to approve it.

dailyNews.title: Iran’s ‘Godfather of propaganda’ tactics resurface in war with US and Israel
dailyNews.description: Experts say Iran uses civilians and children as human shields for propaganda purposes, caring nothing for the safety and fate of its own people.

dailyNews.title: Trump's specific placement of Queen Elizabeth portrait at Mar-a-Lago revealed in new book
dailyNews.description: President Trump has a reproduction of Queen Elizabeth II's last official portrait hanging at Mar-a-Lago, according to a new book about the late monarch.

dailyNews.title: Tigers' Parker Meadows hospitalized after frightening head-on collision with teammate Riley Greene
dailyNews.description: Detroit Tigers outfielder Parker Meadows was hospitalized overnight after a collision with teammate Riley Greene left him with a confirmed concussion.

dailyNews.title: Navy scraps Biden-era submarine contract as overhaul costs surge toward $3B
dailyNews.description: The Navy is canceling the troubled USS Boise submarine overhaul after costs neared $3 billion, redirecting resources to newer Virginia-class submarines.

dailyNews.title: Harris, Buttigieg, other Dem hopefuls court key Black leaders at Sharpton convention
dailyNews.description: Pete Buttigieg and Kamala Harris headline a cattle call of 2028 Democratic presidential contenders at the National Action Network convention in NYC.

dailyNews.title: David Spade wonders if Hollywood can recover its movie industry as people flee Los Angeles
dailyNews.description: David Spade and Dana Carvey discuss Hollywood's decline with Tim Dillon, calling on Gavin Newsom and Karen Bass to prioritize the entertainment industry.

dailyNews.title: WILL CHAMBERLAIN: 'Maryland Dad' is perfect example of why Rep Salazar's amnesty scam must fail
dailyNews.description: Rep. Maria Salazar's DIGNIDAD Act is called a backdoor amnesty bill that could grant citizenship to millions of illegal immigrants who broke the law.

dailyNews.title: Ivanka Trump recalls the moment her father was shot in Butler, Pennsylvania
dailyNews.description: Ivanka Trump describes the assassination attempt on her father as incredibly difficult but says she chooses gratitude because he survived that day.

dailyNews.title: Nation’s second-largest school district targeted by Trump over secretive trans policy
dailyNews.description: The Los Angeles Unified School District faces a DOJ investigation over a policy that allegedly lets staff withhold students' gender identity from parents.

dailyNews.title: The Mass Purge of Immigration Judges, and Melania Trump’s Surprise Epstein Remarks
dailyNews.description: Plus, your Friday news quiz.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump Says She Was Not Associated With Jeffrey Epstein
dailyNews.description: Responding to what she said were smears, the first lady said she never had knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein’s abuse and was not a victim of his. She called for a congressional hearing for his victims.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Changes Lock Some Employers Out of H-1B Visa Program
dailyNews.description: Since imposing a $100,000 fee on new visas in September, the Trump administration has upended the skilled worker program.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Returns to Court for Yet Another Tariff Lawsuit
dailyNews.description: States and small businesses challenged the 10 percent tax on many imports that President Trump imposed after the Supreme Court struck down a previous slate of tariffs.

dailyNews.title: Where Mail Voting Began, Worries Spread Over Trump’s Attacks
dailyNews.description: In the Pacific Northwest, mail-in ballots have been the norm for decades, but President Trump’s war on such voting has turned a point of regional pride into another partisan battle line.

dailyNews.title: Israel and Hezbollah Trade Strikes Further Threatening Ceasefire
dailyNews.description: New Israeli strikes in Lebanon targeting what it says is the Iran-backed militia Hezbollah are threatening the fragile ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran. Leaders of Iran say Lebanon is an inseparable part of the ceasefire, which the U.S. and Israel dispute. It comes as the White House team is set to meet Iranian officials in Pakistan for talks this weekend. NBC’s Stephanie Gosk reports for TODAY from Tel Aviv.

dailyNews.title: A mother mourning the son she lost in the Iran war says she told Trump: 'Go get 'em'
dailyNews.description: More than a month after her son, Maj. Cody Khork, died in the Iran war, Donna Burhans has found a routine that helps her cope.

dailyNews.title: Exclusive: Cuban president reacts to Trump admin’s call for him to step down
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel says "stepping down [is] not part of our vocabulary" amid reports that the U.S. government has asked the Cuban leader to resign.

dailyNews.title: Trump posts graphic video of deadly hammer attack, blames Democratic immigration policies
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump posted a graphic video showing a man smashing an SUV parked outside a Florida gas station with a hammer and then using the hammer to bludgeon a woman who exited the attached convenience store to confront him.

dailyNews.title: White House warned staff against making Iran war bets on prediction markets
dailyNews.description: The warning came after a flurry of unusual activity on oil and stock futures markets shortly before President Trump said he would pause attacks on Iran.
